TAX PLANNING

Keep More of What You Earn

Taxes can be one of the largest expenses in retirement. Strategic tax planning helps you minimize what you owe — legally and ethically — so you keep more for the life you've worked hard to build.

SCHEDULE TAX REVIEW →
"The biggest tax mistake retirees make isn't what they earn — it's the order they spend it." — Mike Stevens, IAR

Key Facts

1 Approach Multi-year projection
2 Strategies 6+ included
3 Coordination Works with your CPA
4 Review Quarterly
5 Minimum $500K savings
6 Cost Included in advisory fee

THE PROBLEM

Does This Sound Familiar?

Your tax bill keeps growing every year

Required Minimum Distributions, Social Security, and investment withdrawals push you into higher brackets — and no one's told you how to avoid it.

You're paying IRMAA surcharges on Medicare

A few thousand dollars over the income threshold can cost you hundreds per month in extra Medicare premiums — money that didn't have to leave your pocket.

Your CPA only looks backward

Tax preparers file last year's return. They don't build multi-year strategies to optimize your tax liability across your entire retirement.

You don't know which accounts to tap first

Should you pull from your IRA, Roth, brokerage account, or some combination? The order matters — and most retirees guess wrong.

THE SOLUTION

How We Help

Strategic Tax Planning for Retirement

We don't just file returns. We build multi-year tax strategies designed to minimize your lifetime tax liability — not just this year's bill.

Our approach includes Roth conversion analysis, strategic withdrawal sequencing, IRMAA avoidance planning, and coordination with your CPA to execute strategies that save you tens of thousands (sometimes hundreds of thousands) over your retirement.

$200K+ Average lifetime tax savings for clients with proper planning

Our Tax Strategies Include:

  • Roth IRA conversion planning (when and how much)
  • Strategic withdrawal sequencing from multiple account types
  • Medicare IRMAA avoidance strategies
  • Social Security taxation optimization
  • Tax-loss harvesting in down markets
  • Asset location optimization (which investments in which accounts)
  • Charitable giving strategies (QCDs, donor-advised funds)
  • Coordination with your CPA for seamless execution

How it Works

It's just three steps

BECOME A CLIENT
Step 1) Tax Analysis ▾

We review your tax returns, account structures, and income sources to identify opportunities and risks.

Step 2) Build the Strategy ▾

Create a year-by-year tax roadmap showing optimal withdrawal timing, Roth conversions, and IRMAA management.

Step 3) Execute & Monitor ▾

Implement strategies with your CPA, monitor tax law changes, and adjust as your situation evolves.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Tax Planning FAQ

Everything you need to know about tax-efficient retirement strategies.

Talk to a Tax Advisor
